LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT JOHN KNUTSON'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION ONE IF PLAINTIFF WISHES TO SEEK A DECLARATION OF RIGHTS OTHER THAN THE RIGHT TO POSSESS THE UNIT, THE EXCLUSIVE DECLARATION SOUGHT IN PARAGRAPH 16 AND THE PRAYER FOR RELIEF. SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 2 TO PLEAD A BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM. OVERRULED AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 3. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTIONS 4 & 5 AS TO WHICH PLAINTIFF DID NOT RESPOND. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
